headline: 5 Broker-Adored Stocks to Watch Amid Escalating Middle East Tensions
summary: BG, ADM, AVT, AAL and BLMN land on a broker-upgrade screen as Middle East tensions, Hormuz limits and higher oil prices shake markets.
